mapper.sql: id, name, token_prefix, token_hash, user_id, project_id, scopes, expire_time, enable, create_time, create_user
mapper.select: select from agent_token where token_hash = #{tokenHash} and enable = 1 limit 1
select from agent_token where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into agent_token (id, name, token_prefix, token_hash, user_id, project_id, scopes, expire_time, enable, create_time, create_user) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tokenPrefix,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tokenHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scopes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expireTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enable,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
select count(1) from agent_token
and (name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or user_id like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
